summary: Plugin-grade public starter bundle for OpenUI skill-shaped integrations across Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw-style hosts.
audience: maintainers, builders, and agent teams that need sample configs, proof loops, and bounded starter metadata on top of the current OpenUI surfaces
role: starter contracts, starter bundles, manifest metadata, troubleshooting, and boundary-first examples
installPath: Inspect starter-bundles/codex.mcp.json or starter-bundles/claude-code.mcp.json for ready-to-adapt host config
Inspect starter-bundles/codex-plugin/ or starter-bundles/claude-code-plugin/ for official-surface-ready bundle directories
Inspect starter-bundles/openclaw.mcp.json or starter-bundles/openclaw-skill/ for the repo-owned OpenClaw public-ready bundle

codex.currentTruth: The repo ships a Codex Plugin Directory-ready bundle and MCP config, but it does not claim an official directory listing.

claudeCode.currentTruth: The repo ships a Claude Code marketplace-ready bundle and MCP config, but it does not claim an official marketplace listing.
claudeCode.operatorOnlyTail: Marketplace submission and approval remain operator/platform actions.

openclaw.currentTruth: The repo ships an OpenClaw / ClawHub-ready skill bundle and MCP config, but it does not claim an official listing.
openclaw.operatorOnlyTail: ClawHub publication and review remain operator/platform actions.

notFor: claiming a plugin registry integration that does not exist
claiming an official OpenClaw or ClawHub listing
